title: DOSED: The Trip of a Lifetime
original_title: Dosed 2: The Trip of a Lifetime
overview: Laurie, a terminally ill cancer patient and loving mother of four, is granted the right to legally use magic mushrooms to treat her end of life anxiety. She then embarks on a remarkable journey of personal transformation and healing while exploring lesser known possible cures for cancer, like cannabis oil.
